title: mac_client docs
body:
add doc explaining setup for podman on mac in current stage of dev

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <ashleycui16@gmail.com>

comments.body: Great start @ashley-cui!  Most comments are of the nit variety.
Big documentation changes like this are usually a lot easier to write and comment on inside of google docs then they are in github.

> Big documentation changes like this are usually a lot easier to write and comment on inside of google docs then they are in github.

Got it for next time :) I think I have all the necessary changes, PTAL @rhatdan
Other than the last linux-ip comment from @rhatdan, LGTM.
LGTM, ship it when the CI behaves.

/lgtm
/hold
Do a hold cancel when the tests complete.

/hold cancel

@rhatdan tests passed, need an appprove
